evidence.summary: Final audit reports zero priority issues for all 28 canonical M28P main pages.
HTTP local status 200, 37528 bytes, page opened and includes M28P discovery section.
node --check passed for inline JavaScript extracted from the page.

evidence.snippet: Descobrir para além da palavra — Não vamos só decorar a palavra. Vamos descobrir sílabas, sons e letras, formar uma palavra nova e escrever uma frase curta.
Princípio M28P — evitar uso puramente visual

evidence.summary: Proofread report pass true with pt-PT AO90 and M28P evidence.

limitations: Browser console was not inspected with Playwright; compensated with HTTP load, offline dependency scan, and static artifact checks.
